issue.message: Consider using `apply()` instead; `commit` writes its data to persistent storage immediately, whereas `apply` will handle it in the background
Consider using `apply()` instead; `commit` writes its data to persistent storage immediately, whereas `apply` will handle it in the background
Consider using `apply()` instead; `commit` writes its data to persistent storage immediately, whereas `apply` will handle it in the background
Consider using `apply()` instead; `commit` writes its data to persistent storage immediately, whereas `apply` will handle it in the background
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.

Field requires API level 30 (current min is 28): `android.Manifest.permission#MANAGE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE`
The locale folder "`id`" should be called "`in`" instead; see the `java.util.Locale` documentation
Do not hardcode "/sdcard/"; use `Environment.getExternalStorageDirectory().getPath()` instead
Do not hardcode "/sdcard/"; use `Environment.getExternalStorageDirectory().getPath()` instead
Method compress must be called from the worker thread, currently inferred thread is UI thread
Found dynamic locale changes, but did not find corresponding Play Core library calls for downloading languages and splitting by language is not disabled in the `bundle` configuration
Should use `android:showAsAction` when not using the appcompat library
Should use `android:showAsAction` when not using the appcompat library

Avoid passing `null` as the view root (needed to resolve layout parameters on the inflated layout's root element)
Avoid passing `null` as the view root (needed to resolve layout parameters on the inflated layout's root element)
Limit vector icons sizes to 200×200 to keep icon drawing fast; see https://developer.android.com/studio/write/vector-asset-studio#when for more
A newer version of Gradle than 8.13 is available: 8.14.5
A newer version of com.android.application than 8.13.2 is available: 9.2.1

A newer version of io.github.tutorialsandroid:filepicker than 9.2.5 is available: 10.1.3

A newer version of org.projectlombok:lombok than 1.18.42 is available: 1.18.46
A newer version of com.squareup.okhttp3:okhttp than 5.3.2 is available: 5.4.0
A newer version of org.jetbrains.kotlin.android than 2.2.21 is available: 2.4.0
A newer version of dev.rikka.rikkax.material:material than 2.7.0 is available: 2.7.2

Use of this function is discouraged because resource reflection makes it harder to perform build optimizations and compile-time verification of code. It is much more efficient to retrieve resources by identifier (e.g. `R.foo.bar`) than by name (e.g. `getIdentifier("bar", "foo", null)`).

When you define `paddingEnd` you should probably also define `paddingStart` for right-to-left symmetry
